textByHash.241293dcec0a3ccf74251aaf2c1fa6008993904c: Well this is grand darling. How nice it is to make your acquaintance!
textByHash.3338132a8e27d94c6afbdaa36ff6cbabe21a7698: My dear, I'm a camel, how should I know?
textByHash.3aa535f74044879489e9742fbb2eda5dcb7e0309: I think I am somewhat confused.
textByHash.077ddfc568a6b97c6c6623c71283cdf4d7eb7484: May one ask how you contacted me?
textByHash.b49a37d765d3a48c004243cf6bb841e01f589a82: Oh my, oh my. These youngsters today and their new-fangled gadgets!
